field_values.action_summary: John Carter leads fifty Tharks, under the command of Tars Tarkas, through the gates of Zodanga and into the palace gardens to disrupt the wedding ceremony.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of cavalry charge; Medium tracking shots of Carter and Tars Tarkas; Close-ups of determined faces
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Lighting transitions from city streets to garden shadows
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH025_SC001

## Production Intent
Execute a high-scale transition from the tension of an infiltration to the aggressive momentum of a military assault. The sequence must visually communicate the sheer number of Thark warriors and the shift in lighting as they move from city streets into garden shadows.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- tars_tarkas
- Thark Warriors

## Required Environments
- zodanga_palace_dungeons (Gates)
- zodanga_palace_throne_room (Gardens)

## Continuity Constraints
- Weapon positions during movement
- Thark armor and gear consistency
- Lighting transitions from city streets to garden shadows

## Beat List
- BT001: Infiltration through the gates
- BT002: Movement into gardens
- BT003: Aggressive charge toward ceremony
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
